campaign.title: Guia de compra inteligente de amigurumi

briefing.interpretation: The strategy positions the amigurumi as a high-end artisanal product by emphasizing its tactile craftsmanship through professional studio photography. This approach builds consumer trust by highlighting the specific quality markers and uniform stitch patterns essential for a smart buying decision.
briefing.identifiedProduct: A premium handmade crochet Charmander amigurumi featuring tangerine orange yarn, a pale cream belly, and a distinct yarn flame tail.
briefing.visualDirection: The 'realista' style is applied through high-fidelity photographic techniques, using macro lenses to capture the authentic texture of the yarn and soft studio lighting to create depth and professional appeal.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Main header image with clear product placement
channelRecommendations.prompt: Stunning 16:9 horizontal header photography of The Charmander Amigurumi: Tangerine Orange handmade crochet toy with uniform knit texture, Pale Cream belly, and yarn flame tail, centered on a minimalist white wooden studio table with scattered balls of premium yarn, soft studio lighting, clean shadows, high resolution 8k, professional product shot.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Macro detail shot focusing on craftsmanship quality
channelRecommendations.prompt: Professional toy photography of the exact [Visual DNA: Charmander Amigurumi], placed in a minimalist studio scene, high quality yarn texture, soft studio lighting, macro lens capturing tight consistent stitches, 8k, pastel bokeh background.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Centric framing for vertical product showcase
channelRecommendations.prompt: Dynamic vertical shot of the exact [Visual DNA: Charmander Amigurumi] sitting in a professional minimalist studio setup, vibrant tangerine colors, soft lighting, depth of field, 8k, high-end toy photography.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Clean lifestyle composition for social sharing
channelRecommendations.prompt: Square product shot of The Charmander Amigurumi: Tangerine Orange handmade crochet toy, positioned beside a soft linen cloth and a small wooden measuring tape to show scale, professional minimalist studio setup, soft lighting, 8k resolution, realistic environment.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Sophisticated wide shot highlighting artisanal value
channelRecommendations.prompt: Sophisticated landscape shot of The Charmander Amigurumi: Tangerine Orange handmade crochet toy, showcasing its artisanal craftsmanship in a bright professional studio environment, clean composition, soft bokeh background, high-resolution commercial photography.
